name: portrait_crop
prompt: Clean scan dust and gently align with the softer reference mood.

name: sepia_fade
prompt: Restore faded tonal range, reduce dust, and keep the sepia look natural.

name: scratch_heavy
prompt: Reduce scratches and dust while preserving faces and composition.

name: low_contrast_soft
prompt: Recover contrast gently and keep the image realistic.

name: tight_crop_damage
prompt: Clean localized damage and softly match the reference tone.
